en: He is taller than me.
This book is more expensive than that one.
Today is colder than yesterday.
She is smarter than her sister.
This question is more difficult than that one.
Cats are smaller than dogs.
He runs faster than me.
This road is longer than that one.
She sings better than me.
This apple is sweeter than that one.
He is the tallest student in the class.
This is the highest mountain in the world.

zh: 她是我们学校最好的老师。
en: She is the best teacher in our school.
This is the most difficult question.
He runs the fastest in the class.

zh: 这是我吃过的最好吃的蛋糕。
en: This is the most delicious cake I have ever eaten.

zh: 一月是一年中最冷的月份。
en: January is the coldest month of the year.

zh: 她是三个孩子中最小的。
en: She is the youngest of the three children.
This is the cheapest option.
He is my best friend.

zh: 这条裙子和那条一样贵。
en: This dress is as expensive as that one.
He is as tall as his brother.
Today is not as cold as yesterday.

zh: 她的英语和我的一样好。
en: Her English is as good as mine.
This question is not as difficult as that one.
The weather is getting hotter and hotter.
He is getting taller and taller.
The harder you work, the more successful you will be.

zh: 这本书比我想象的更有趣。
en: This book is more interesting than I thought.

zh: 她比班里任何人都努力。
en: She works harder than anyone else in the class.
